title: Router Decision Provenance
description: The inputs, choice, and applied constraints for a single static-priority router selection. Recorded as a decision_provenance signal and as a LearningEntry decision. This is the stable interface a future optimiser must also populate.

policy.description: The selection policy. Pinned to static-priority in this slice; future optimisers use a different value.

feasible_set.description: Assignments that passed the hard (Cedar) feasibility filter, in evaluated order.

rejected.description: Assignments excluded by the feasibility filter, with reasons.

reason.description: Human-readable selection rationale, e.g. 'cheapest eligible tier' or 'spill on 429 from codex'.

cohesion_applied.description: True when the work-package cohesion preference influenced the choice.
